subcodes.title: Letter to Tahirih (Maku)
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who createth whatsoever He willeth through His grace, and glorified and exalted be He above all that they describe. O God! I bear witness before Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی یبدع ما یشاء بفضله سبحانه و تعالی عما یصفون اللهم انی اشهدک و من لدیک
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
